candidate_entries.doc_name: 【约克】YHAC-B风冷空气源热泵机安装调试与维护手册（33页）-制冷百家网.pdf

structured_payload_candidate.title: YHAC-B Operating Limits
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Outdoor temperature limits: cooling 21~45°C DB, heating -15~15°C DB. Leaving water temperature: cooling 5~12°C, heating 25~45°C. Max water pressure 1.0 MPa.

candidate_entries.judge_reason: Operating limits with temperature and pressure bounds are valid performance specifications supported by evidence.

candidate_entries.doc_name: 【约克】YHAC-B风冷空气源热泵机安装调试与维护手册（33页）-制冷百家网.pdf

structured_payload_candidate.title: Water Quality Requirements
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Water quality standards: pH 7.5-8.0, total hardness 4.8-8.5 dH, oxygen content <0.1 ppm, free chlorine <0.5 ppm, etc.

candidate_entries.doc_name: 【约克】YHAC-B风冷空气源热泵机安装调试与维护手册（33页）-制冷百家网.pdf

structured_payload_candidate.title: Water System Cleaning and Passivation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: After installation, clean the water system with trisodium phosphate or sodium carbonate, then passivate with sodium nitrite or similar inhibitor.

candidate_entries.judge_reason: Water system cleaning and passivation procedure is a valid maintenance procedure supported by evidence.

candidate_entries.doc_name: 【约克】YHAC-B风冷空气源热泵机安装调试与维护手册（33页）-制冷百家网.pdf

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Clearance for YHAC-B Units
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Maintain at least 20 cm clearance around the unit for proper airflow and service access.

candidate_entries.judge_reason: Minimum clearance requirement is valid application guidance for installation.

candidate_entries.doc_name: 【约克】YHAC-B风冷空气源热泵机安装调试与维护手册（33页）-制冷百家网.pdf

structured_payload_candidate.title: E2ROM Fault
structured_payload_candidate.summary: E2ROM fault indicates a memory error in the controller.

candidate_entries.judge_reason: E2ROM fault code with meaning is a valid fault code entry.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Communicating Fault
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Communicating fault indicates a communication error between controller and other devices.

candidate_entries.judge_reason: Communicating fault code with meaning is a valid fault code entry.
